creator: anarcat@anarcat.ath.cx
text:
On Thu, Jun 12, 2008 at 03:17:51AM -0300, Felippe de Meirelles Motta wrote:
> Hmm, now I understand. Maybe the better way to you create a
> finance/ledgersmb12. Or repocopy finance/ledgersmb to
> finance/ledgersmb11 and upgrade the actual on the ports tree. How you
> prefer ?

I'm not saying we should do a repo-copy or keep two ports. All I'm
saying is that the port name change (ledger-smb -> ledgersmb) should be
in a seperate patch so that I can review it seperatly.

I don't have CVS access, by the way...

A.
